html:
Exclusive to:

“Install on a Backup Chassis to lure a gestalt over and possess it, for your very own spectrobotic minion!”

-

The Spectral Transfer Module is an item that can only be crafted by WX-78 with "Lunar Vessel" skill. It can be installed on a Backup Chassis that belongs to the player to lure a nearby Gestalt, Greater Gestalt or Incursive Gestalt and possess it, or WX-78 can put an Encapsulated Gestalt in the Chassis. After possession, the Module will drop out the Chassis, making it reusable.

The Chassis will become a Possessed Chassis and start following WX-78. They will carry the effect of the circuits that have been plugged in, even with insufficient charges. Circuits tinkering skills also take effects on them.

Trivia

  • Spectral Transfer Module is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.

–Wormwood

–Winona
“They plan to host a ghost...”
–Wortox
“Weird Ironfolk stuff.”
–Wurt
“This must do something reaaally neat, Woby.”
–Walter
“Madness...”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mô-đun Truyền Quang phổ là một vật phẩm chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi WX-78 với kỹ năng "Tàu Mặt Trăng". Nó có thể được cài đặt trên Khung gầm dự phòng của người chơi để thu hút Gestalt, Greater Gestalt hoặc Incursive Gestalt gần đó và sở hữu nó, hoặc WX-78 có thể đặt Gestalt được đóng gói vào Khung gầm. Sau khi sở hữu, Mô-đun sẽ thả Khung xe ra, khiến nó có thể tái sử dụng được.

{{Scrapbook Info|Install on a Backup Chassis to lure a gestalt over and possess it, for your very own spectrobotic minion!}}
The '''Spectral Transfer Module''' is an item that can only be crafted by [[WX-78]] with "[[Lunar Vessel]]" skill. It can be installed on a [[Backup Chassis]] that belongs to the player to lure a nearby [[Gestalt]], [[Greater Gestalt]] or [[Incursive Gestalt]] and possess it, or WX-78 can put an [[Phasmo-Encapsulator#Encapsulated Gestalts|Encapsulated Gestalt]] in the Chassis. After possession, the Module will drop out the Chassis, making it reusable.

The Chassis will become a [[Possessed Chassis]] and start following WX-78. They will carry the effect of the circuits that have been plugged in, even with insufficient charges. Circuits tinkering skills also take effects on them.
